reason: Expand the June 30 scoring baseline with real guide routes that separate source-coverage remediation from guide decision-path remediation, and add numeric dimension bounds for source_count, source_quality, buyer_intent, and internal_links.
expected_effect: Gold-set calibration should pass with 9 cases, 0 mismatches, threshold review pass, one source_coverage_gap guide baseline, and one strengthen_buyer_decision_path guide baseline with strong source coverage.
